articles.title: Row over inauguration of new building of Kerala University
articles.description: Thiruvananthapuram: The move to inaugurate a building meant for University Institute of Technology (UIT) in Sasthamkotta, without the permission of Ke.
articles.content: Thiruvananthapuram: The move to inaugurate a building meant for University Institute of Technology (UIT) in Sasthamkotta, without the permission of Kerala University (KU) vice-chancellor (VC) and syndicate, kicked up a row. KU VC Mohanan Kunnummal is... [1004 chars]

articles.title: AI founders must move fast to stay on top of tech stacks: Resolve AI CEO Spiros Xanthos
articles.description: With artificial intelligence maturing rapidly and demand from customers increasing significantly, AI startups need to move fast and stay on top of every layer of the technology stack from hardware to user experience, said Spiros Xanthos, founder and chief executive of Resolve AI, an agentic AI platform for software troubleshooting.
articles.content:
Synopsis
With artificial intelligence maturing rapidly and demand from customers increasing significantly, AI startups need to move fast and stay on top of every layer of the technology stack from hardware to user experience, said Spiros Xanthos, fou... [4148 chars]

articles.description: COMPANY ANNOUNCEMENT:  InterSystems, a creative data technology provider powering more than one billion health records globally, announced t...
articles.content: In this role, Dr Ferris will leverage his comprehensive view of the industry to help drive the clinical and strategic direction of the company’s healthcare solutions worldwide. Drawing on his vast experience, he will serve as a strategic advisor to g... [2413 chars]

articles.title: EBANX announces HQ in Singapore and forecasts a 30% growth for APAC merchants in 2026
articles.description: Global technology company integrates local payment methods across emerging markets in Latin America, Africa, and Asia for more than 100 APAC enterprise merchants36% of EBANX's TPV last year came from APAC companies, which will have a technology and commercial hub in the new regional HQThe Headquarters will be a payments product and regulatory center for e-commerce global brandsEBANX's CPO and regional CEO will be based at the new APAC center, alongside senior leaders in engineering, technology, treasury, business, and operationsSINGAPORE, March 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- EBANX, a global technology company specializing in payment services for emerging markets, will inaugurate an Asia-Pacific Headquarters in Singapore on March 24. The HQ will further strengthen EBANX's presence in the APAC region, where the company has been partnering with leading e-commerce merchants to support their expansion into emerging markets since its founding in 2012.**media[969775]**
articles.content:
Global technology company integrates local payment methods across emerging markets in Latin America, Africa, and Asia for more than 100 APAC enterprise merchants
36% of EBANX's TPV last year came from APAC companies, which will have a technology and ... [4572 chars]

articles.title: Shenzhen-listed Delton Technology (Guangzhou) seeks up to $423 million in Hong Kong listing
articles.description: Shenzhen-listed Delton Technology (Guangzhou) is seeking to raise up to HK$3.31 billion ($422.99 million) through ​a Hong Kong listing, according to an ‌exchange filing on Thursday.
articles.content:
The printed circuit board maker is offering 46 million H shares at a ​maximum offer price of HK$71.88 each, ​the filing showed.
Sign up here.
Final pricing for the listing ⁠is scheduled for March 19, with the ​shares set to begin trading the followin... [831 chars]

articles.title: Hundreds of women get tech job support in £4m government-backed programme
articles.description: The package also includes paid tech placements and support for those returning after career breaks to re-enter technology jobs.
articles.content:
Ministers said thousands of 12 and 13-year-old girls will get experience of what future work would be like in tech ahead of the launch of an expanded UK-wide girls tech competition.
The package also includes paid tech placements and support for those... [896 chars]

articles.title: EBANX announces HQ in Singapore and forecasts a 30% growth for APAC merchants in 2026
articles.description: Global technology company integrates local payment methods across emerging markets in Latin America, Africa, and Asia for more than 100 APAC enterprise merchants36% of EBANX's TPV last year came from APAC companies, which will have a technology and commercial hub in the new regional HQThe Headquarters will be a payments product and regulatory center for e-commerce global brandsEBANX's CPO and regional CEO will be based at the new APAC center, alongside senior leaders in engineering, technology, treasury, business, and operationsSINGAPORE, March 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- EBANX, a global technology company specializing in payment services for emerging markets, will inaugurate an Asia-Pacific Headquarters in Singapore on March 24. The HQ will further strengthen EBANX's presence in the APAC region, where the company has been partnering with leading e-commerce merchants to support their expansion into emerging markets since its founding in 2012.**media[969775]**
